articles.title: How Sancho's dream Man Utd move became a nightmare

articles.title: Can you name every Women's League Cup finalist?
articles.summary: The Women's League Cup final takes place on Sunday as Manchester United take on Chelsea at Ashton Gate. Can you name every finalist in the competition's short history?

articles.title: How Newcastle took advantage of James playing in midfield
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundit Joe Hart explains how Newcastle were able to take advantage of Chelsea playing Reece James in midfield instead of his usual right-back position.

articles.title: Mother’s Day Special with Ellen White and Celin Bizet
articles.summary: Celin joins Ellen to discuss her journey to motherhood as a professional footballer.

articles.title: Record-breaker Dowman scores late as Arsenal beat Everton
articles.summary: Sixteen-year-old Max Dowman becomes the youngest scorer in Premier League history, as Arsenal score twice in the last 10 minutes to beat Everton 2-0 and move 10 points clear at the top of the table.

articles.title: Strange Minteh goal enough to give Brighton win over Sunderland
articles.summary: Yankuba Minteh scores the only goal of the game in bizarre fashion as Brighton beat Sunderland 1-0 at the Stadium of Light, for their third win in four games in the Premier League.

articles.title: Bournemouth held by struggling Burnley
articles.summary: Bournemouth lost further ground in the race for European football as they were held to a fourth consecutive Premier League draw by relegation-threatened Burnley at Turf Moor.

articles.title: We've got a special player on our hands with Dowman - Hart
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundits Joe Hart and Ashley Williams praise Max Dowman after the 16-year old became the youngest goalscorer in the Premier League in Arsenal's 2-0 win over Everton.

articles.title: 'Incredible' Dowman changed 'unbelievable' game - Arteta
articles.summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says Max Dowman "is not fazed" by any occasion as the 16-year old comes off the bench to become the Premier League's youngest goalscorer in Arsenal's 2-0 win over Everton.
